title: YouTube Channel Scraper Pro
description: Scrape videos from YouTube channels with advanced filtering (Long form, Shorts, Date, Views, Likes).

channelUrls.title: Channel URLs
channelUrls.description: List of YouTube channel URLs to scrape (e.g., https://www.youtube.com/@mkbhd).

minUploadDate.title: Minimum Upload Date
minUploadDate.description: Filter videos uploaded ON or AFTER this date. Format: YYYY-MM-DD. Leave empty to ignore.

maxUploadDate.title: Maximum Upload Date
maxUploadDate.description: Filter videos uploaded ON or BEFORE this date. Format: YYYY-MM-DD. Leave empty to ignore.

minViews.title: Minimum Views
minViews.description: Only scrape videos with at least this many views.

fetchLikes.title: Fetch Like Counts (Slower)
fetchLikes.description: If enabled, the scraper will visit each video page individually to fetch like counts. WARNING: This will significantly increase scraping time and consume more Apify credits.

minLikes.title: Minimum Likes
minLikes.description: Only scrape videos with at least this many likes.

maxItemsPerChannel.title: Maximum Items Per Channel
maxItemsPerChannel.description: Maximum number of videos to scrape per channel (0 for unlimited).

maxDaysOld.title: Maximum Days Old (e.g. 30 for 1 month)
maxDaysOld.description: Stop scraping videos uploaded older than this many days. Leave 0 to disable.
